title: The legacy authenticated GWT client path is retired from the default runtime and packaging flow
summary: The maintained J2CL root shell and its search-sidecar asset are now rebuilt for `sbt run`, `Universal/stage`, and `Universal/packageBin`, while the legacy GWT client path remains only as a manual bridge task.

items: Rebuilt the maintained J2CL search-sidecar asset as part of `sbt run` and the staged packaging flow so clean trees no longer depend on leftover artifacts
Kept the legacy `compileGwt` task only as a manual bridge for the retired authenticated GWT client path instead of wiring it into the default runtime
Updated the smoke and build notes to match the maintained J2CL root shell, landing page, and sidecar route contract
